description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty hammer with a large, rectangular head that appears to be made of solid metal, likely steel, and features reinforced bands and a central raised emblem on each striking face. The head is thick and blocky, with beveled edges and a symmetrical design, suggesting it is intended for delivering powerful blows. The handle is straight, medium in length, and constructed from a dark brown material resembling wood, with several black grip bands spaced along its length for enhanced handling and control. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, with no visible decorative elements or branding, and the proportions suggest it is a sledgehammer type, suitable for demolition or heavy-duty urban tasks. The surface of the hammer is matte and non-reflective, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or damage. The color palette is dominated by black and dark brown, giving it a professional and rugged appearance.
description: A heavy-duty, block-headed sledgehammer with a matte black metal head and a straight, dark brown handle featuring black grip bands. The design is robust, utilitarian, and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed directly from the narrow end of the head, showing the rectangular striking face and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: This view displays the broad side of the hammer's head, revealing the central raised emblem and the full length of the handle with its grip bands.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite narrow end of the head, again highlighting the rectangular striking face and the handle's alignment.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the other broad side of the head with the same emblem and handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with black rubberized grip bands spaced along its length for enhanced grip and control.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of solid metal with beveled edges and a central raised emblem on each broad face; both ends are flat striking faces.
